context: area: webview/src/spec-viewer/components (ActivityTabs, VerifiedCard, CoverageCard, PlanSection) + webview/styles/spec-viewer/_activity.css
constraint: taste findings from issue #405 screenshot review; impeccable source pass already clean
constraint: no capture/schema changes; hero status + header badge pairing stays
intent: Make the Activity panel read as designed: one deliberate focus treatment, each number once, checks as pills, headings with hierarchy
expectations: hero status + viewer header badge pairing stays (page chrome vs panel summary)
approach: Presentation-layer pass over the shipped Activity panel: one model edit (tab badges become attention-only with a warning tone) plus CSS/markup fixes — focus-visible tabs, single donut, flex-wrap check pills, Title Case headings, no coverage bullets, a derived --text-label token, and a capitalized header title.

decisions.decision: focus-visible ring + suppressed plain-click outline on tabs
decisions.why: keeps the keyboard affordance while removing the three-sided box artifact

decisions.decision: tab badges keep count field, gain warning flag; Proof/Notes badge only attention counts
decisions.why: smallest model change; presence and default-tab rules untouched
decisions.rejected: badge object {value, tone} — more churn for two fields

decisions.decision: Title Case headings via explicit strings, not text-transform: capitalize
decisions.why: capitalize mangles mid-title words; explicit strings are exact

decisions.decision: new --text-label token derived from theme foreground via color-mix
decisions.why: descriptionForeground is below AA on dark; follows the #254 direction

plan.summary: Plan + research + data-model + UI contract for the 8-finding polish; one model edit, rest CSS/markup
plan.key_finding: the focus artifact is the default webview outline colliding with the active-tab underline — solvable with :focus-visible alone

tasks.summary: 14 tasks across 7 phases: foundational token+badge model, 4 story phases (focus, dedupe, pills, headings), polish (stories/docs/verify); _activity.css serialized T004→T008→T009

implement.summary: All 8 findings fixed: focus-visible tabs, single donut, attention badges, packed pills, cased headings, no bullets, --text-label token, capitalized header — 1176 tests green
